name: heracleum-tox
description: In-silico toxicology of Heracleum sosnowskyi (Sosnowsky's hogweed) plant metabolites. Reproduces Rassabina & Fedorov 2025 (Plants 14, 3253) using open-source analogues of the Syntelly platform: RDKit/PubChem for SMILES, ECFP4 + t-SNE + agglomerative clustering as a SynMap analogue, open CatBoost/XGBoost models trained on Therapeutics Data Commons (TDC) and TOXRIC for acute LD50 (mouse) regression and hepatotoxicity / drug-induced liver injury (DILI) / cardiotoxicity (hERG) / carcinogenicity classification, a kNN(k=5)+Gaussian applicability domain, and ASKCOS for synthesis cost. Use for: predicting acute toxicity / LD50 of natural products and furanocoumarins (bergapten, psoralen, xanthotoxin, bergamottin, imperatorin, umbelliferone, scopoletin), chemical-space clustering of metabolite sets, hepatotoxicity/DILI/cardiotoxicity/carcinogenicity prediction with applicability-domain reliability, plant secondary-metabolite safety profiling, furanocoumarin/coumarin/terpenoid/fatty-acid analysis, synthesis-cost estimation, and full in-silico tox profiling of any molecule given by name or SMILES.
